title: bauhinia calliandroides
intro: Bauhinia calliandroides, also known as the buffalo horn or bauhinia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia calliandroides include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
